ddl.where: recurring_series_id IS NOT NULL AND status != 'cancelled'
ddl.name: uq_recurring_instance

ddl.where: status = 'waitlisted' AND waitlist_expires_at IS NOT NULL
ddl.name: idx_reservation_waitlist_expires

ddl.where: cancelled_at IS NULL AND superseded_by IS NULL
ddl.name: idx_recurring_series_active
